title: Product Designer

title: Senior Product Designer
_verificationNote: Verified live via browse.py (Ashby page rendered, full job description confirmed, Apply button present). Published 2026-07-01. Tava Health — venture-backed startup scaling access to behavioral healthcare; partners with organizations to bring mental health care to employees/members/communities. Senior PD leads patient-facing product experiences: conversion flows, onboarding, provider matching, booking, billing, and in-session telehealth. 5+ years consumer product design required; conversion funnels and payment experience; AI tool integration encouraged. Competitive salary + stock options + covered medical/dental. Remote US. New company not in jobs.json.
